title: OpenDih Gets a Fresh Look
excerpt: We've given our website a complete redesign. Here's everything that's new and improved.
content:
After a few hours of dedicated work, we're thrilled to unveil our completely redesigned digital space to the world.

The goal was simple: to create a digital space that truly represents who we are as a collective. We wanted something clean, fast, and minimal — much like the engineers who make up our community.

What's New:

Blog Section: The blog section has been improved on both the frontend and backend.
Team Showcase: A dedicated team page showcasing the incredible people behind OpenDih. Each team and their contributions are now visible for everyone to see.
Visual Refresh: An orange accent has been added to the website's theme.

We hope this new space helps you understand what we're building and why it matters. Stay tuned for more updates as we continue pushing the boundaries of collective intelligence.
